logistic_regression.interpretation: Negative coefficient = higher multiplier reduces non-optimal rate (spec direction reduces brand preference)

summary.finding: INVERTED: Significant dose-response but in unexpected direction (logistic p=0.000528, coef=0.0960). Higher multiplier INCREASES non-optimal choices.
